title: Clickefy — Digital Marketing Agency
description: Fully custom WordPress theme from scratch (PHP, HTML/CSS, JavaScript) with no page-builder dependency. Built service pages, blog system, lead generation contact forms, and optimised on-page SEO including meta tags, schema markup, and site performance.

title: Dentify — Dental Clinic CMS Platform
description: Full-stack dental clinic management platform with a headless CMS for appointments, services, and content. Designed relational schema using Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL on Supabase. Implemented SSR and static generation for fast loads and strong SEO.

title: SAT Exam Portal — WordPress Plugin
description: Custom WordPress plugin delivering SAT practice questions with dynamic rendering and interactive UI. Modular plugin architecture with custom post types, shortcodes, and admin settings. Deployed on live Hostinger environment with real SAT content.

title: Digital Marketing Full-Stack Website
description: Full-stack digital marketing website with an admin panel to manage blogs, services, and contact submissions. CRUD operations with Express and MongoDB, Nodemailer integration, and a responsive React + Tailwind CSS UI.

title: E-Commerce REST API
description: RESTful API for full product inventory management with CRUD operations. Modular MVC architecture with Mongoose ORM for schema validation; all endpoints tested via Postman.

title: Real-Time Chat Application
description: Real-time chat app enabling users to join chat rooms and exchange instant messages using Socket.IO. MongoDB for persistent chat history, responsive UI with live dynamic updates.
